value.found_quote: apps.<id>.tools.<tool>.enabled boolean Per-tool enabled override for an app tool (for example repos/list).
value.rationale: The page describes configuration keys that restrict which tools/commands an agent may run, including per-tool enabled overrides (apps.<id>.tools.<tool>.enabled), default_tools_enabled, code_mode tool namespace exclusions, and approval/permission controls. This substantiates the claim of tool scoping in Codex configuration.
